decision_summary: Approve v9.6 as provider execution cost/quota preflight governance, not as proof of actual provider billing correctness.
rationale: The release makes budget owner, cost ceiling, token/call/retry caps, quota, rate-limit, billing, and overage policy visible before provider execution can advance.
recommendation: Proceed to release verification after cost/quota, capability, product value, and release-state audits are green.
target_audience: AOF operator evaluating provider-backed execution readiness
expected_user_reaction: Operator can see whether provider execution is cost/quota bounded before allowing the provider track to advance.
